title: Man critically injured in Vlaardingen stabbing; Two men arrested
title_zh: 弗拉尔丁根发生持刀伤人事件，一名男子伤势严重；两名男子被捕
description: A man was seriously injured in a stabbing inside a home in Vlaardingen, and police arrested two men in connection with the incident, authorities said Sunday.
description_zh: 当局周日表示，一名男子在弗拉尔丁根的一处住宅内被刺伤，伤势严重，警方逮捕了两名与此事件有关的男子。

title: Barn fire in Bornerbroek traps smoke between houses, sends odor through streets
title_zh: 博纳布鲁克谷仓火灾导致浓烟滞留在房屋之间，气味弥漫街道。
description: A barn fire in Bornerbroek early Sunday caused heavy smoke to linger between homes along Entersestraat, according to the Veiligheidsregio Twente.
description_zh: 据特温特省治安局称，周日凌晨，博纳布鲁克的一座谷仓发生火灾，导致恩特塞斯特拉特街沿线的房屋之间浓烟弥漫。

title: Seven arrested in Dutch vehicle tax fraud scheme worth €2.5 million
title_zh: 荷兰警方逮捕七名涉嫌250万欧元车辆税欺诈案的嫌疑人
description: The Dutch Fiscal Information and Investigation Service (FIOD) arrested seven suspects last week in connection with a large-scale vehicle tax fraud scheme, the agency announced Saturday.
description_zh: 荷兰财政信息和调查局 (FIOD) 周六宣布，上周逮捕了七名涉嫌大规模车辆税欺诈计划的嫌疑人。

title: Explosions damage two homes in Roermond, police seek witnesses
title_zh: 鲁尔蒙德两栋房屋发生爆炸受损，警方正在寻找目击者。
description: Two homes in Roermond were damaged early Sunday after a loud explosion, believed to involve heavy fireworks, police said.
description_zh: 警方称，周日凌晨，鲁尔蒙德两栋房屋在一声巨响后受损，据信爆炸与大型烟花有关。

title: Over 100 homes report damage after two earthquakes shake Assen area
title_zh: 阿森地区发生两次地震，超过100户房屋报告受损。
description: More than 110 damage reports have been filed following twoearthquakesne
description_zh: 两次地震后，已提交超过110份损失报告。

title: Police investigate link between Amsterdam and Rotterdam blasts
title_zh: 警方正在调查阿姆斯特丹和鹿特丹爆炸案之间的关联
description: A group that has claimed responsibility for setting off explosions outside Jewish buildings in Amsterdam, Rotterdam and Liège appears to...
description_zh: 一个声称对阿姆斯特丹、鹿特丹和列日犹太建筑外爆炸事件负责的组织似乎……

title: Dry March likely to end on high temperatures before seasonal weather returns in April
title_zh: 三月可能持续干燥，气温偏高，之后四月才会恢复季节性天气。
description: March in the Netherlands is likely to end on a warm and dry note, but starting in April, meteorologists expect a return to more typical seasonal conditions, according to
description_zh: 荷兰三月的天气可能以温暖干燥的天气结束，但气象学家预计，从四月开始，天气将恢复到更典型的季节性状况。

title: Video: Man killed in Amsterdam Nieuw-West shooting; Police investigate multiple sites
title_zh: 视频：阿姆斯特丹新西区发生枪击案，一名男子身亡；警方正在调查多起枪击案。
description: A man was killed in a shooting in Amsterdam Nieuw-West early Sunday, police said. Authorities reported receiving multiple calls about gunfire in the area before finding the victim.
description_zh: 警方称，周日凌晨，阿姆斯特丹新西区发生一起枪击案，一名男子身亡。当局表示，在发现受害者之前，他们接到了多起关于该地区发生枪击事件的报警电话。

title: Jetten praises Dutch Paralympians for winning five medals, including two golds
title_zh: 杰滕赞扬荷兰残奥运动员赢得五枚奖牌，其中包括两枚金牌。
description: The Netherlands’ Paralympic delegation secured five medals at the Winter Games, including two golds, three silvers, and one bronze, with all wins coming in skiing and snowboarding events.
description_zh: 荷兰残奥代表团在冬季奥运会上获得了五枚奖牌，其中包括两枚金牌、三枚银牌和一枚铜牌，所有奖牌均来自滑雪和单板滑雪项目。

title: Verstappen retires from Chinese Grand Prix due to engine failure
title_zh: 维斯塔潘因引擎故障退出中国大奖赛
description: Max Verstappen, four-time world champion and Red Bull driver, retired from the Chinese Grand Prix Sunday after experiencing engine trouble, officials reported.
description_zh: 据官方消息，四届世界冠军、红牛车队车手马克斯·维斯塔潘周日在中国大奖赛上因引擎故障退赛。

title: Israel’s President calls attacks on Jewish school, synagogue ‘violent antisemitism’
title_zh: 以色列总统称对犹太学校和犹太教堂的袭击是“暴力反犹主义”
description: Israel’s President Isaac Herzog on Saturday condemned what he called “violent antisemitism” in the Netherlands after an explosion at a Jewish school in Amsterdam and an earlier blast and fire at a
description_zh: 以色列总统伊萨克·赫尔佐格周六谴责了荷兰发生的所谓“暴力反犹主义”，此前阿姆斯特丹一所犹太学校发生爆炸，早些时候另一处地点也发生爆炸和火灾。

title: Van Gogh Museum  in Amsterdam acquires rare painting that inspired Vincent van Gogh
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹梵高博物馆购得一幅启发文森特·梵高的珍贵画作
description: The Van Gogh Museum in Amsterdam has acquired a painting by French artist Virginie Demont-Breton, a work that inspired Vincent van Gogh and influenced one of his own interpretations, the museum sai
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹梵高博物馆近日购入了一幅法国艺术家维吉妮·德蒙-布雷顿的画作，这幅画作曾启发过文森特·梵高，并影响了他自己的一幅诠释作品。

title: New push to bring back gambling ad restrictions to prevent compulsive betting, addiction
title_zh: 新一轮推动旨在恢复赌博广告限制，以防止强迫性赌博和赌瘾。
description: Dutch lawmakers are proposing steep fines and near-total advertising restrictions to combat the rapid growth of online gambling in the Netherlands.
description_zh: 荷兰立法者提议处以巨额罚款并近乎全面限制广告，以遏制荷兰网络赌博的快速增长。

title: PSV suffer third league defeat of the season as NEC win 3–2 in Eindhoven
title_zh: PSV在埃因霍温以2-3负于NEC，遭遇本赛季联赛第三场失利。
description: PSV lost to NEC for the second time this month on Saturday.
description_zh: 周六，PSV埃因霍温本月第二次负于NEC。

title: Netherlands and France team up to fight drug trafficking in the Caribbean
title_zh: 荷兰和法国联手打击加勒比地区的毒品走私活动
description: Officials announced Thursday that the Dutch Caribbean Coast Guard and the French Coast Guard on Saint Martin, the French side of Sint Maarten, are now authorized to pursue vessels suspected of drug
description_zh: 官员周四宣布，荷属加勒比海岸警卫队和驻扎在圣马丁岛（圣马丁岛法属部分）的法国海岸警卫队现已获准追捕涉嫌贩毒的船只。

title: About a third of people in the Netherlands avoid the dentist
title_zh: 荷兰约有三分之一的人避免去看牙医。
description: About 22 percent of Dutch adults have avoided visiting the dentist because of cost, according to a survey conducted among participants of the
description_zh: 根据一项针对荷兰成年人的调查，约有22%的荷兰成年人因为费用问题而避免去看牙医。

title: Dutch politicians push to simplify rules in order to speed housing construction
title_zh: 荷兰政界人士力推简化规则，以加快住房建设。
description: Several Dutch municipal council candidates are calling for simpler building rules as a way to increase housing construction, according to a debate on NOS radio ahead of local elections.
description_zh: 据荷兰广播电台NOS在地方选举前夕的辩论报道，几位荷兰市政委员会候选人呼吁简化建筑规则，以此来增加住房建设。

title: Homeless man from Hoeksche Waard arrested for two sexual assaults in Goudswaard
title_zh: Hoeksche Waard 的无家可归男子因在 Goudswaard 的两次性侵犯被捕
description: A 29-year-old homeless man from the Hoeksche Waard municipality was arrested late Sunday night, March 9, in Lelystad in connection with two sexual assaults in a Goudswaard home, police
description_zh: 警方称，一名来自霍克斯赫瓦尔德市的29岁无家可归男子于3月9日星期日晚在莱利斯塔德被捕，他涉嫌在古兹瓦德的一处住宅内犯下两起性侵案。

title: Limburg the only Dutch province that still has more religious people than not
title_zh: 林堡是荷兰唯一一个宗教信徒多于非宗教信徒的省份。
description: Limburg is now the only province in the Netherlands where a majority of residents identify with a religion, according to
description_zh: 据统计，林堡省现在是荷兰唯一一个大多数居民信奉某种宗教的省份。

title: King and Queen volunteer at Hoofddorp care home during NLdoet volunteer drive
title_zh: NLdoet 志愿者活动期间，国王和王后在 Hoofddorp 护理院做志愿者
description: King Willem-Alexander and Queen Máxima joined residents and volunteers Friday to clean up and refresh the inner gardens of care home Bornholm in Hoofddorp as part of NLdoet, the annual volunteer ca
description_zh: 周五，威廉-亚历山大国王和马克西玛王后与居民和志愿者们一起，清理并修缮了位于霍夫多普的博恩霍尔姆养老院的内部花园，这是荷兰年度志愿者活动NLdoet的一部分。

title: In Maastricht, the big concerns are housing and tourism
title_zh: 在马斯特里赫特，住房和旅游业是人们最关心的问题。
description: The Netherlands goes to the polls to vote for 342 local councils on March 18 and Dutch News is focusing...
description_zh: 荷兰将于3月18日举行地方议会选举，荷兰新闻将重点关注此次选举……

title: Dutch health care costs to hit €114.1 billion as experts warn reforms needed
title_zh: 专家警告称，荷兰医疗保健支出将达到1141亿欧元，亟需改革。
description: Health care spending in the Netherlands is expected to reach 114.1 billion euros this year, nearly a quarter of the national budget, as experts warn the system faces mounting pressure from an aging
description_zh: 预计今年荷兰医疗保健支出将达到1141亿欧元，几乎占国家预算的四分之一。专家警告称，人口老龄化给医疗保健系统带来了越来越大的压力。

title: Video: 40-year-old dies in single-car crash on Hamelandroute in Aalten
title_zh: 视频：40岁男子在阿尔滕哈梅兰德路发生的单车事故中丧生
description: A 40-year-old man from Aalten died in a single-car crash on the Hamelandroute near the German border during the night from Friday to Saturday.
description_zh: 周五至周六夜间，一名来自阿尔滕的 40 岁男子在靠近德国边境的哈默兰公路上发生单车事故身亡。

title: House fire in De Pijp, Amsterdam, injures one, leaves building partially uninhabitable
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹德派普区一栋房屋发生火灾，造成一人受伤，部分建筑已无法居住。
description: A fire in an apartment in the Toldwarsstraat neighborhood of De Pijp injured a resident and left the building partially uninhabitable early Friday morning.
description_zh: 周五清晨，德派普区托尔德瓦尔斯街一栋公寓发生火灾，造成一名居民受伤，并使该建筑部分区域无法居住。

title: Tens of thousands in IJmond lose water after major pipeline break
title_zh: 伊蒙德市数万居民因主要输水管道破裂而断水
description: Tens of thousands of residents in the IJmond region were left without water for several hours Saturday morning after a large transport pipeline near Wijk aan Zee ruptured, NOS
description_zh: 据荷兰广播公司（NOS）报道，周六上午，位于维克安泽附近的一条大型输水管道破裂，导致艾蒙德地区数万居民断水数小时。

title: Over 14.2 million people eligible to vote in city council elections next week
title_zh: 下周市议会选举将有超过1420万人有资格投票。
description: More than 14.2 million people in the Netherlands are eligible to vote in next Wednesday’s municipal elections, CBS reported based on preliminary figures.
description_zh: 据哥伦比亚广播公司（CBS）根据初步数据报道，荷兰有超过1420万人有资格参加下周三的市政选举。

title: Stormy showers, snow in Limburg: Netherlands faces mixed weather this weekend
title_zh: 林堡地区将迎来暴雨和降雪：荷兰本周末天气多变
description: The Netherlands will experience a mix of rain, snow, and sunshine over the coming days, with conditions varying sharply by region, weeronline
description_zh: 未来几天，荷兰将出现雨、雪和晴天交替的天气，各地天气状况差异很大。（weeronline）

title: Russia files criminal case against Netherlands over ‘theft’ of Crimea Gold
title_zh: 俄罗斯就克里米亚黄金“盗窃”事件对荷兰提起刑事诉讼
description: Russian authorities have opened a criminal case against the Netherlands, Ukraine, and Amsterdam’s Allard Pierson Museum, accusing them of “theft” over the return of a disputed collection of ancient
description_zh: 俄罗斯当局已对荷兰、乌克兰和阿姆斯特丹的阿拉德·皮尔森博物馆提起刑事诉讼，指控它们在归还一批有争议的古代文物藏品的过程中犯有“盗窃罪”。

title: Explosion hits Jewish school in Amsterdam after synagogue attack in Rotterdam
title_zh: 继鹿特丹犹太教堂袭击事件后，阿姆斯特丹一所犹太学校发生爆炸。
description: An explosive device detonated overnight against the outer wall of a Jewish school in Amsterdam-Buitenveldert, authorities said Saturday, in the latest in a series of incidents targeting Jewish inst
description_zh: 当局周六表示，一枚爆炸装置夜间在阿姆斯特丹-布伊滕费尔德特区一所犹太学校的外墙上引爆，这是近期一系列针对犹太机构的袭击事件中的最新一起。

title: Magnitude 3.0 earthquake near Eleveld gas field wakes residents in Drenthe
title_zh: 德伦特省埃尔维尔德气田附近发生3.0级地震，惊醒了当地居民。
description: A magnitude 3.0 earthquake struck near the Eleveld gas field in Drenthe early Saturday, waking residents across the area including the nearby city of Assen, according to the
description_zh: 据报道，周六清晨，德伦特省埃尔维尔德天然气田附近发生3.0级地震，震醒了包括附近城市阿森在内的周边地区居民。

title: Explosion outside Jewish school in Amsterdam: “targeted attack”
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹一所犹太学校外发生爆炸：“有针对性的袭击”
description: An explosion went off on Friday night outside a Jewish school in Buitenveldert in Amsterdam causing limited damage, according to...
description_zh: 据报道，周五晚间，阿姆斯特丹布伊滕费尔德特一所犹太学校外发生爆炸，造成的损失有限。

title: Dutch PM’s centrist D66 party bleeding support with move towards right wing policies
title_zh: 荷兰首相领导的中间派政党D66因转向右翼政策而支持率暴跌。
description: If the Tweede Kamer elections were held today, GroenLinks-PvdA and D66 would emerge as the largest parties, according to the latest Ipsos I&O seat
description_zh: 根据益普索（Ipsos）最新发布的I&O民意调查结果，如果今天举行下议院选举，绿党-工党联盟（GroenLinks-PvdA）和民主66党（D66）将成为最大党。

title: Amsterdam mayor sounds alarm over “erosion” of democratic institutions
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹市长对民主制度的“侵蚀”发出警报
description: The democratic rule of law is under pressure, and it is time to “warn of great danger,” said Amsterdam Mayor Femke Halsema in Vlaardingen while presenting the Geuzenpenning to her Budapest counterp
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹市长费姆克·哈尔塞玛在弗拉尔丁根向布达佩斯市长颁发《格岑彭宁》时表示，民主法治正面临压力，现在是时候“发出巨大危险的警告”了。

title: Half of women sometimes feel unsafe on public transport
title_zh: 半数女性有时会在公共交通工具上感到不安全。
description: A significant portion of Dutch public transport users report feeling unsafe while traveling, with women disproportionately affected, according to a new survey.
description_zh: 一项新的调查显示，相当一部分荷兰公共交通用户表示在出行过程中感到不安全，其中女性受到的影响尤为严重。

title: New courses planned for citizens without university degrees to get into politics
title_zh: 为没有大学学历的公民开设新课程，帮助他们进入政界。
description: A new initiative aims to help Dutch citizens without a higher vocational (hbo) or university (wo) degree participate in politics.
description_zh: 一项新举措旨在帮助没有高等职业教育（hbo）或大学（wo）学位的荷兰公民参与政治。

title: Dutch MPs criticize Cabinet over deployment of frigate with non-operational gun
title_zh: 荷兰议员批评内阁部署一艘配备非作战火炮的护卫舰。
description: Many politicians have criticized the Cabinet after Defense Minister Dilan Yeşilgöz confirmed that the frigate HNLMS Evertsen was deployed to the eastern Mediterranean despite having a non-operation
description_zh: 国防部长迪兰·耶希尔戈兹证实，尽管“埃弗森”号护卫舰并未执行作战任务，但仍被部署到东地中海，此举引发了许多政界人士对内阁的批评。

title: Young people on welfare often have complex mental health problems
title_zh: 领取福利的年轻人往往存在复杂的心理健康问题。
description: The number of young people receiving social assistance has been growing for three years. The time they spend on welfare is also increasing.
description_zh: 领取社会救助的年轻人数量已连续三年增长，他们领取救助的时间也在延长。

title: Dozens of teens pelt police with fireworks, glass in Utrecht; Two cops hurt
title_zh: 在乌得勒支，数十名青少年向警察投掷烟花和玻璃碎片；两名警察受伤。
description: In the Utrecht district of Overvecht, two police officers were injured on Tuesday evening after being targeted with heavy fireworks by local youths.
description_zh: 周二晚上，乌得勒支省奥弗韦赫特区两名警察遭到当地青年投掷的大型烟花袭击而受伤。

title: Jaitsen Singh back in the Netherlands after nearly 42 years in a U.S. prison
title_zh: 杰森·辛格在美国监狱服刑近42年后返回荷兰
description: The Dutch citizen believed to have spent more time in a foreign detention facility than any other citizen arrived back in the Netherlands on Friday morning.
description_zh: 据信在国外拘留设施中被关押时间最长的荷兰公民于周五上午返回荷兰。

title: Amsterdam cops release video of person of interest in New Year's murder of Syrian teens
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹警方公布了一名与新年叙利亚青少年谋杀案有关的嫌疑人的视频
description: Police officers in Amsterdamreleased video footageon Thursday related to their investigation into the
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹警方周四公布了一段与他们对一起案件调查相关的视频录像。

title: Government pushes ahead with mandatory disability insurance for self-employed
title_zh: 政府推进自雇人士强制性残疾保险政策
description: The government aims to fast-track legislation requiring self-employed workers to have disability insurance.
description_zh: 政府计划加快立法进程，要求自雇人士必须购买残疾保险。

title: Netherlands drops to 7th in UEFA Rankings, losing second direct Champions League spot
title_zh: 荷兰队在欧足联排名中跌至第七位，失去了第二个直接晋级欧冠联赛的席位。
description: The Netherlands has definitively lost sixth place on the UEFA coefficient rankings to Portugal.
description_zh: 荷兰队在欧足联系数排名中已彻底失去第六名的位置，被葡萄牙队超越。

title: Fewer people in NL are religious, Catholics are biggest group
title_zh: 荷兰信教的人较少，天主教徒是最大的群体。
description: The number of people considering themselves to be religious in the Netherlands has fallen again to 42%, national statistics office...
description_zh: 荷兰国家统计局的数据显示，该国自认为有宗教信仰的人口比例再次下降至42%……

title: Amsterdam-area officials call on national government to abolish tax break for expats
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹地区官员呼吁国家政府取消对外国人的税收优惠
description: Approximately 40 local politicians from the Amsterdam area, including officials from Amsterdam, Haarlem, and Almere, have written to the national parliament calling for the 30 percent ruling to be
description_zh: 包括阿姆斯特丹、哈勒姆和阿尔梅勒等地的官员在内的约40名阿姆斯特丹地区的地方政界人士已致信荷兰议会，呼吁废除30%的税收限制规定。

title: Four arrested for Rotterdam synagogue arson; Suspects caught near another synagogue
title_zh: 四人因鹿特丹犹太教堂纵火案被捕；嫌疑人在另一犹太教堂附近落网
description: The police arrested four suspects for anexplosion and fire at a synagogueon A.B.N.
description_zh: 警方逮捕了四名涉嫌在ABN电视台报道的犹太教堂制造爆炸和纵火案的嫌疑人。

title: Iran's new Supreme Leader uses a Dutch VPN
title_zh: 伊朗新任最高领袖使用荷兰VPN
description: Mojtabe Khamenei, the newly appointed Supreme Leader of Iran, has several social media channels on X, posting in different languages.
description_zh: 伊朗新任最高领袖莫杰塔贝·哈梅内伊在X平台上拥有多个社交媒体账号，使用多种语言发布内容。

title: Accidental Americans win lower fees campaign to end citizenship
title_zh: “意外美国公民”赢得降低费用的运动，旨在终止公民身份
description: A change in regulations from the US State Department has dropped the price for giving up American citizenship, following a...
description_zh: 美国国务院修改了相关规定，降低了放弃美国公民身份的代价……

title: Longest-serving Dutch prisoner abroad is back in the Netherlands
title_zh: 在海外服刑时间最长的荷兰囚犯已返回荷兰。
description: Jaitsen Singh, the longest-serving Dutch prisoner abroad, has been brought back from the US to the Netherlands, eight months after...
description_zh: 被流放海外时间最长的荷兰囚犯贾特森·辛格在被美国关押八个月后，已从美国被遣返回荷兰……

title: Local and left-wing politicians call for 30% ruling to go
title_zh: 当地左翼政客呼吁废除30%多数票通过的法令。
description: Some 40 local politicians from the Amsterdam area, including Amsterdam, Haarlem and Almere, have written to the national parliament calling...
description_zh: 包括阿姆斯特丹、哈勒姆和阿尔梅勒在内的阿姆斯特丹地区约40名地方政客已致信荷兰议会，呼吁……

title: Rotterdam synagogue arson is shocking, says mayor, minister, Jewish community
title_zh: 鹿特丹市长、部长和犹太社区称，犹太教堂纵火案令人震惊
description: The mayor of Rotterdam, Carola Schouten, expressed shock after an act of arsontargeted a synagoguein the
description_zh: 鹿特丹市长卡罗拉·舒滕对一起针对犹太教堂的纵火案表示震惊。

title: Podcast: The You Cannot Vote For Henk Krol Edition
title_zh: 播客：你不能投票给 Henk Krol 版
description: Want to support the DutchNews podcast and keep up our stocks of stroopwafels and orange tompouces? Click here to become...
description_zh: 想支持 DutchNews 播客，并让我们的焦糖华夫饼和橙味甜甜圈库存充足吗？点击此处成为……

title: Motion for mandatory members has Wilders on shaky ground after 10,000 days in parliament
title_zh: 在议会任职一万天后，强制议员制动议令维尔德斯的政绩岌岌可危。
description: Motion for mandatory members has Wilders on shaky ground after 10,000 days in parliament
description_zh: 在议会任职一万天后，强制议员制动议令维尔德斯的政绩岌岌可危。

title: ASML workers still in uncertainty weeks after announcement of 1,700 job cuts
title_zh: ASML宣布裁员1700人数周后，员工仍处于不确定状态。
description: Weeks after ASML announced with its annual figures that it was going to lay off 1,700 employees, the chip machine maker’s workers still don’t know whether or not they will be affected.
description_zh: 在 ASML 公布年度财务数据并宣布将裁员 1700 人数周后，这家芯片制造公司的员工仍然不知道自己是否会受到影响。

title: Cop to be prosecuted for having his dog bite a pro-Palestine protestor at Radboud Univ.
title_zh: 一名警察因放任其狗咬伤拉德布德大学一名支持巴勒斯坦的抗议者而被起诉。
description: A police officer will be prosecuted for setting his dog on a protester during a pro-Palestine demonstration at Radboud University in Nijmegen last year, the Public Prosecution Service (OM
description_zh: 一名警官将因去年在奈梅亨拉德布德大学举行的支持巴勒斯坦示威活动中放狗攻击抗议者而被起诉，公共检察署（OM）表示。

title: Men most likely to have unprotected sex with causual partner; Women test more for STI's
title_zh: 男性最有可能与非固定性伴侣发生无保护性行为；女性接受性传播感染检测的次数更多。
description: Last year, 5 percent of Netherlands residents aged 16 and older had sex without a condom with a casual partner.
description_zh: 去年，荷兰 16 岁及以上居民中有 5% 与非固定性伴侣发生无保护性行为。

title: Dutch understand US-Israeli attack on Iran but do not support it
title_zh: 荷兰人理解美国和以色列对伊朗的攻击，但不支持这种攻击。
description: The Dutch government does not support the US-Israeli attack on Iran but says it understands why it took place, prime...
description_zh: 荷兰政府不支持美国和以色列对伊朗的袭击，但表示理解袭击发生的原因，主要……

title: More men than women have unprotected sex, survey shows
title_zh: 调查显示，男性发生无保护性行为的比例高于女性。
description: Men in their 20s have unprotected sex with a casual date more often than women in that age group, and...
description_zh: 20多岁的男性比同年龄段的女性更容易与临时约会对象发生无保护性行为，而且……

title: Fire at Rotterdam synagogue was arson attack
title_zh: 鹿特丹犹太教堂火灾系人为纵火袭击
description: A fire at a synagogue in Rotterdam in the early hours of Friday was started deliberately, police have said. The...
description_zh: 警方称，周五凌晨发生在鹿特丹一座犹太教堂的火灾系人为纵火。

title: Gov't working on more compensation for loan system students; Up to €2,000 extra
title_zh: 政府正努力为贷款学生提供更多补偿；最高可达2000欧元额外补偿。
description: Students who fell under the loan system may receive extra compensation.
description_zh: 曾受贷款制度约束的学生可能会获得额外补偿。

title: Iran war affects each sector of Dutch economy: Rabobank
title_zh: 伊朗战争影响着荷兰经济的各个领域：荷兰合作银行
description: The Iran war is impacting economic growth across all sectors in the Netherlands, according to Rabobank.
description_zh: 荷兰合作银行表示，伊朗战争正在影响荷兰所有行业的经济增长。

title: Dutch football loses second automatic Champions League place
title_zh: 荷兰足球失去第二个欧冠直接晋级名额
description: The Netherlands has lost its crucial sixth place on Uefa’s coefficient ranking to Portugal, meaning the Eredivisie will lose a...
description_zh: 荷兰在欧足联系数排名中失去了至关重要的第六名，被葡萄牙超越，这意味着荷甲联赛将失去……

title: Local election watch: Housing in Delft – again the biggest issue
title_zh: 地方选举观察：代尔夫特的住房问题——再次成为最大议题
description: The Netherlands goes to the polls to vote for 342 local councils on March 18 and Dutch News is focusing...
description_zh: 荷兰将于3月18日举行地方议会选举，荷兰新闻将重点报道……

title: Arson at Rotterdem synagogue; Police investigating
title_zh: 鹿特丹犹太教堂发生纵火案；警方正在调查
description: As yet unidentified perpetrators started a fire at the synagogue on A.B.N.
description_zh: 身份不明的肇事者在ABN电视台的犹太教堂纵火。

title: First-time buyers losing ground to people moving up the property ladder
title_zh: 首次购房者正逐渐被那些寻求改善住房条件的人所取代。
description: First-time buyers seem to be losing ground to homeowners buying their next home in the Dutch housing market.
description_zh: 在荷兰房地产市场，首次购房者似乎正在被购买下一套住房的业主所超越。

title: Jean-Michel Jarre to be guest of honor, opening act at 30th Amsterdam Dance Event
title_zh: 让-米歇尔·雅尔将作为特邀嘉宾出席第30届阿姆斯特丹舞蹈盛会并担任开场表演嘉宾。
description: Jean-Michel Jarre is coming to the Amsterdam Dance Event this fall. The pioneer of electronic music will be the guest of honor and ADE’s opening act at AFAS Live.
description_zh: 让-米歇尔·雅尔将于今年秋季亮相阿姆斯特丹舞蹈音乐节（ADE）。这位电子音乐先驱将作为特邀嘉宾出席，并在AFAS Live舞台上为ADE拉开帷幕。

title: Eindhoven plans 5,400 new student homes to ease housing shortage
title_zh: 埃因霍温计划新建5400套学生公寓，以缓解住房短缺问题。
description: Eindhoven city authorities have unveiled plans to create roughly 5,400 new student apartments over the next eight years, aiming to ease the city’s significant shortage of student housing,
description_zh: 埃因霍温市政府公布了一项计划，将在未来八年内新建约5400套学生公寓，旨在缓解该市学生住房严重短缺的问题。

title: Groningen launches campaign to keep children aged 10–14 out of drug trade
title_zh: 格罗宁根发起运动，旨在让10至14岁的儿童远离毒品交易。
description: The municipalities and province of Groningen on Thursday launched a campaign aimed at preventing children between 10 and 14 years old from becoming involved in drug trafficking.
description_zh: 格罗宁根市和格罗宁根省于周四发起了一项运动，旨在防止 10 至 14 岁的儿童参与毒品贩运。

title: AZ Alkmaar take 2-1 first-leg lead against Sparta Prague thanks to Troy Parrott double
title_zh: 凭借特洛伊·帕罗特的梅开二度，阿尔克马尔在首回合比赛中以2-1领先布拉格斯巴达，领先优势来自四球。
description: AZ Alkmaar were victorious in the first leg of their UEFA Europa League last 16 tie vs Czech side Sparta Prague on Thursday.
description_zh: 周四，阿尔克马尔在与捷克球队布拉格斯巴达的欧足联欧洲联赛16强首回合比赛中获胜。

title: Speedskater Jutta Leerdam’s husband, Jake Paul, wins Trump political endorsement
title_zh: 速滑运动员尤塔·莱尔丹 (Jutta Leerdam) 的丈夫杰克·保罗 (Jake Paul) 赢得了特朗普的政治支持
description: Dutch Olympic champion ice skater Jutta Leerdam’s fianceé, Jake Paul, has received a political endorsement from U.S. President Donald Trump for a future political career.
description_zh: 荷兰奥运冠军花样滑冰运动员尤塔·莱尔丹的未婚夫杰克·保罗获得了美国总统唐纳德·特朗普的政治支持，有望开启未来的政治生涯。

title: Explosive increase in from-home bakers & cooks, but 9 in 10 don't know food safety rules
title_zh: 在家烘焙和烹饪的人数呈爆炸式增长，但十分之九的人不了解食品安全规则。
description: Cooking shows and food content on TikTok are inspiring more and more Netherlands residents to start up a small catering business from their homes.
description_zh: TikTok上的烹饪节目和美食内容正激励着越来越多的荷兰居民在家开办小型餐饮企业。

title: Former Oranje international Romeo Castelen handed jail term, €2M fine in laundering case
title_zh: 前荷兰国家队球员罗密欧·卡斯特伦因洗钱案被判入狱并罚款200万欧元
description: The district court in Zwolle has sentenced former international footballer Romeo Castelen to 18 months in prison, six of which are conditionally suspended, for money laundering.
description_zh: 兹沃勒地区法院判处前国际足球运动员罗密欧·卡斯特伦 18 个月监禁，其中 6 个月缓刑，罪名是洗钱。

title: Hundreds of Dutch travelers still stranded amid Middle East flight chaos
title_zh: 数百名荷兰旅客仍因中东航班混乱而滞留。
description: Several hundred stranded travelers still want to be repatriated from the Middle East, Foreign Minister Tom Berendsen has said during a debate in the Tweede Kamer, the lower house of Dutch parliamen
description_zh: 荷兰外交大臣汤姆·贝伦森在荷兰议会下院（Tweede Kamer）的辩论中表示，仍有数百名滞留在中东的旅客希望返回家园。

title: Dutch regulator warns AI chatbots ignore local parties ahead of municipal elections
title_zh: 荷兰监管机构警告称，人工智能聊天机器人应忽略地方政党，以免影响市政选举。
description: A new investigation by the Dutch Data Protection Authority (AP) has exposed a significant flaw in how AI chatbots handle municipal elections.
description_zh: 荷兰数据保护局 (AP) 的一项新调查揭露了人工智能聊天机器人在处理市政选举方面存在重大缺陷。

title: Dutch public largely opposed to recent U.S., Israel attacks on Iran
title_zh: 荷兰公众普遍反对美国和以色列近期对伊朗的袭击。
description: Most Dutch citizens are critical of the U.S.
description_zh: 大多数荷兰公民对美国持批评态度。

title: Dutch will intervene in Gaza genocide case at World Court
title_zh: 荷兰将介入国际法院加沙种族灭绝案。
description: The foreign ministry announced on Thursday that it will submit arguments to the International Court of Justice about the genocide...
description_zh: 外交部周四宣布，将向国际法院提交关于种族灭绝的论据……

title: Trial begins for Dutch man who beheaded his mother in Hellevoetsluis
title_zh: 在赫勒福茨路易斯，一名荷兰男子斩首其母亲，审判开始。
description: Jesse R., 32, is on trial for the April 16murderof his 63-year-old mother in her Hellevoetsluis ho
description_zh: 32岁的杰西·R因涉嫌于4月16日在赫勒沃茨路易斯家中谋杀其63岁的母亲而受审。

title: Middle East war impact on Dutch economy very uncertain: CPB
title_zh: 荷兰央行：中东战争对荷兰经济的影响非常不确定
description: Dutch household spending power will barely grow in the coming years and could come under further pressure because of international...
description_zh: 未来几年，荷兰家庭的购买力几乎没有增长，而且由于国际形势的影响，可能面临进一步的压力……
